data: Threats seem like a ridiculous farce.
Subject gains a bonus on Perception checks.
Attackers' weapons stick to your gluey blood.
You gain a bonus on Diplomacy checks and performance combat checks.
Summon a duplicate of yourself from a parallel world to aid another
Assume form of a Small or Medium humanoid.
Conceal a drow's appearance with that of a surface elf.
You gain some of the beneficial qualities of an animal.
Sends a Tiny animal to a specific place.
Create a mental mine that damages creatures that target you with mind-affecting effects
Creatures forget details about you and conversations with you.
As ant haul, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Gain increasing bonuses to AC and on attack rolls and damage rolls against one creature.
Send or receive a small object via teleportation.
Cloak yourself in a phantasm that ellicits certain emotions from observing creatures
Learns whether an action will be good or bad.
Aura of psychic noise makes concentration difficult
Cause the target to avoid an object or location.
Subject gains +4 to Con for 1 min./level.
Grant the target a bonus on a skill check and consider them trained.
Grants a creature proficiency in a single weapon for short period of time.
Your blood hardens when you are wounded, increasing your AC.
Ignite the blood of those who come near you.
Enhance those with a blood frenzy.
Cause yourself and enemies to bleed.
Attacks miss subject 20% of the time.
Targets take fire damage; orcs get +2 Strength.
Gain armor spikes which provide +1 natural armor and a +2 damage with natural weapons.
Gain various bonuses when interacting with the target.
You gain a +4 deflection bonus to AC against firearm attacks.
Subject gains +4 to Str for 1 min./level.
Subject gains +4 to Dex for 1 min./level.
Cold metal damages those who touch it.
Speak, read, and Write a new code language.
Ask a question to all birds within a mile of your location.
Target is compelled to help injured ally.
Prevent target from speaking the truth.
Creature answers question truthfully or takes 1d6 damage/two levels (max 5d6).
Ask eldritch entities to find and converse with you
Create a poltergeist to disrupt crafting and spellcasting
Creates treasure map out of a creature's corpse.
Touching the marked object or area turns one's skin red.
Living creature of 6 HD or less loses next action.
Blame someone else for your actions.
Make a creature give you an object it's holding.
Learn what makes a creautre anxious.
As detect magic, but learn more information.
Sense the presence and attributes of mindscapes.
Weaken a creature's resistance to one type of energy
As disguise self, but affects you or another.
Creates a magical sensor high above you.
Subject gains +4 to Cha for 1 min./level.
Armor you wear no longer slows your speed.
See enchantment spells active on creatures
As endure elements, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Ward yourself against thought detection and memory alteration.
As alarm, but alerts you when a creatuer leaves the area
Fog obscures vision and fascinates living creatures.
Alter creature's buoyancy so that it swiftly rises to the surface
Gain a bonus to AC, on Escape Artist checks, and when grappling.
Change to become one age category younger or older
Impose light blindness on your enemies.
A target starves with an insatiable hunger.
Notice traps as a rogue does.
As ancestral regression but for disguising a wayang as a gnome.
Alter your appearance to appear living.
Gain skill bonuses when interacting with the target.
Create a magical longsword made entirely of force.
Subject gains +4 to Int for 1 min./level.
Plant a seed of doubt in the target, causing self-doubt.
Create a ghost touch whip that passes through objects.
You look like a ghost of yourself.
You take no falling damage and move 60 ft./round while falling.
Creatures are shaken and take Wis damage.
After Intimidating a creature, make it afraid of your retribution
Makes metal so hot it damages those who touch it.
Shift the target's attitude one step more hostile towards you and everyone else nearby. This also penalizes his attacks, saves, and certain skill checks.
Remove one piece of information from your memory and turn it into a magical tattoo
Prevent creatures from noticing your presence.
Gain +10 on Bluff to send secret messages.
Subject loses actions for 1 round/ level.
Distort all of the targets senses
Screaming pain limits the target's actions.
Grant target a +2 enhancement bonus to an ability score.
Rapidly recall everything you know about a subject.
Confuse one creature for the duration of your concentration + 1 round.
Instill false psychic impressions into an object.
Target takes a -4 penalty on attack rolls, skill checks, and ability checks.
Summon armor temporarily replacing your current attire.
Start a psychic duel between yourself and another creature.
Roll twice and take the higher roll when using certain mental skills.
Subject is invisible for 1 min./level or until it attacks.
As invisibility, but altered to work better underwater
Force a creature to become jittery, taking a penalty on Dexterity-related checks and being unable to delay, ready, or take a total defense action.
Channels the force of an enemy's attack back into its weapon.
Opens locked or magically sealed door.
Alter a creature's buoyancy so that it plummits to the depths
Subject moves up and down at your direction.
Affected creatures automatically donate hp to stabilize fallen ally.
Senses direction toward object (specific or type).
Target takes penalties to mental actions.
As mask dweomer, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Gain a +4 shield bonus to AC and resist mind thrust for 1 round as an immediate action.
Prevent the target from using its skill ranks, spells, feats, and abilities.
Reassign ability damage/drain from one ability to another.
As mind thrust I, but deal 1d8 points of damage per level (maximum 5d8).
Charge your attacks with violent psychic energy.
As silent image, plus some sound.
Store a replica of yourself in the Akashic Record, end the spell when injured to be healed 1d8+1/level
As many as eight creatures hide in an extradimensional space.
Creates decoy duplicates of you (1d4 + 1 per three levels, max 8).
Misleads divinations for one creature or object.
Opponents cannot attack a pathetic creature.
Frighten creature with an existential crisis
Allies gain a bonus on Stealth checks but risk verbal spell failure.
Alter a creature's buoyancy to be neutral, granting them increased maneuverability
Read psychic impressions left on an object.
Make the text on a page more difficult to decipher
Distract and fatigue the target with a creature from its nightmares.
Make it permanently easier to learn more about a target.
Target creature gains the ferocity ability
Subject gains +4 to Wis for 1 min./level.
damage creature who recognize an illusion for what it is
Target becomes hostile to all creatures.
Target is staggered by a painful sound.
You may seize an object or manipulate it from afar.
Temporarily suppress an affliction or condition.
Subject gains DR 10/magic against ranged attacks.
Shadow protects the target from light.
Leech a target's strength, forcing them to become fatigued in order to grant you power.
Gain a +4 bonus to a random ability score and a -2 penalty to another one.
Turns fire into blinding light or choking smoke.
Target gains penalties on ability checks, skill checks, and concentration checks until it spends an entire round doing nothing.
Ignores 10 (or more) points of damage/attack from specified energy type.
Grants a weapon the returning special weapon quality.
As light, but hampers Stealth checks
As many as eight creatures hide in extradimensional space.
Transform your mouth into a ferocious maw, gain a bestial roar to demoralize your enemies.
Panics creatures of less than 6 HD.
Perceive nearby creatures that are experiencing fear
Determine mental disturbances in nearby creatures
Make concentrating difficult for a creautre, forcing a save to perform standard or full-round actions
Tether a creature to its shadow, preventing it from moving too far.
As share language, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Share one memory with the target.
Sonic vibration damages objects or crystalline creatures.
Target gains a 25% chance to treat critical hits and sneak attacks as normal hits.
You take half of subject's damage.
Make a target sound as if elsewhere.
Give yourself privacy by muffling sound leaving the area.
Animate and possess your own skin as if it were a separate creature.
Create a cone of damaging sound at will.
Creates disembodied glowing hand to deliver touch attacks.
Grants ability to walk on walls and ceilings.
Create an aura around a target weapon to weaken a foe's magical defenses.
Target takes 3d6 points of fire damage and catches on fire.
Target immediately adjusts to the surrounding pressure
Steal the breath from a creature's lungs.
Touch attack deals 2d6 damage and staggers target.
Compels subject to follow stated course of action.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
Either grant a bonus to saves against, or suppress, charm and compulsion spells
As magic aura, but affects all similar objects in a 5-foot radius
You gain an additional +1 on attack rolls or to AC due to battlefield positioning.
Assembles a siege engine using 1 fewer worker for every two caster levels.
Imbue a creature's limbs with force, adding damage to unarmed strikes
As an immediate action, gain a +4 bonus on Will saves against mind-affecting effects.
Lower a creature's Will vs mind-affecting effects
Nearby creatures are affected by haste or slow each round.
Subject takes 1d6 penalty to Int, Wis, and Cha.
Targeted creature's attacks target a random square instead of the intended target.
Target is compelled to kiss or caress another.
Inflict creatures with paranoia and be repulsive to others
The weapon you use for the focus of this spell defends you, allowing you to cast spells without provoking attacks of opportunity.
Surrounds the target with layers of force.
As disguise self, but you can change the disguise as a swift action.
Force your attacker to suffer mental pain when harming you.
Make 1 knowledge check /3 levels with a +10 bonus
Read a creature's or an object's alignment, emotion, health, and magic auras.
Vines beneath your feet stabilize you but slow you down.
Send or receive a Tiny or smaller animal via teleportation.
Magical auras become visible to you.
Use a creature's corpse to adopt its form
Create a phantasm with auditory and visual effects.
Make actions seem mundane to nearby creatures.
Alignment auras become visible to you.
Target becomes nauseated and causes nearby creatures to become fascinated.
Increase the cost to use mythic power.
You randomly vanish and reappear for 1 round per level.
Learn about a creature with its blood.
Magnify the target's ability to smell the presence of blood.
Retry attack or check, but do worse on next two.
You gain increased speed, and your movement ignores attacks of opportunity and allows you to move through the space of creatures larger than you are.
Summon a swarm of wasps to ward an area.
Make a willing target appear to be dead.
Creates a floating chain of force.
Hear or see at a distance for 1 min./level.
Add a thought component to all of the target's spells.
Ask more powerful entities to find and converse with you
Grant bonuses and temporary hit points that spread from creature to creature.
Set the condition for triggering a target's readied standard, move, or swift action.
Causes a creature to become dehydrated.
Transmute one poison into another of equal or lesser value
As darkvision, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
As daze, but affecting multiple creatures.
Stun a creature with pain for 1 round
Puts 10 HD of creatures to sleep.
Animate a glove or gauntlet from a distance.
Send messages as per message with a suggestion for one creature.
An eidolon temporarily loses 1 evolution +1/five levels.
Cancels one magical spell or effect.
Attacks miss subject 50% of the time.
Disrupt all silence effects in an area.
Noise makes it difficult to cast.
Creates a semi-living intelligent draconic servant that loyally obeys and serves you.
Cause living creatures to lose their immunity to fear or mind-affecting effects vs your spells.
Ward a target's mind to protect them while unconscious.
Tendril of ectoplasm grapples a creature and tethers you to it.
Cause a creature to take a -2 penalty to Int, Wis, or Cha and be staggered for 1 round.
Target gains the eldritch ague spellblight.
Add an emotion component to all of the target's spells.
Transfers your consciousness to an object bearing your likeness.
Target takes Dex and Con damage.
Create a menacing duplicate of yourself to interact with others.
As feather step, but affects many targets rather than one.
Learn many of the target's weaknesses and gain a +5 bonus on your next attack.
Subject flies at speed of 60 ft.
Target takes force damage and is pushed away.
As freedom of movement, but only allowing a creature to move freely underwater
Subject becomes insubstantial and can fly slowly.
Bless a monument to imbue nearby humans with 2/magic damage reduction.
Gain a +4 insight bonus on saving throws vs a creature's abilitiy you have identified with a Knowledge check
Know approximate distance from where you cast this spell.
Target takes a -10 penalty to Sense Motive and creatures using Bluff against them gain a +10 bonus on such checks
Change the appearance of a structure to suit your tastes
One creature/level moves faster, receives +1 on attack rolls, AC, and Reflex saves.
You siphon half of all magical healing that the targeted creature receives.
Ghostly hand leads subject to you.
Gives +2 on attack rolls, saves, skill checks.
Cause creatures to gain a phobia
Levitates the targeted creature up off the ground.
As id insinuation I, but affects two creatures and has a stronger confusion effect.
Only select creatures can read text.
As telempathic projection, except the effects remain dormant.
Humanoid becomes friendly to all other creatures.
As invisibility bubble, but capable of affecting larger creatures
Make a creature invisible and silent to their allies.
Fill the target with a sense of entitled self-importance.
Add to your ki pool when you critically hit.
You roll damage twice when you roll damage for a critical hit and take the best damage.
As silent image, plus sound, smell, and thermal effects.
Neutralize the rage effects of those who have attacked you.
As magic jar, but limited to line of sight.
Deal damage to yourself to damage the marked target
You and your gear merge with stone.
As mental barrier I, but +6 to AC.
As mind thrust II, but deal a maximum of 10d8 points of damage.
Target gains a message that can be given only to its intended recipient.
Create a portal allowing entry to and exit from a mindscape.
As the dream spell, except delivering a shorter message.
Create up to four motes that shed light or darkness.
Cause splitting headaches and an oversensitivity to light and darkness.
Create a seductive song to lure all nearby creatures.
Place a trap on an object to mentally damage a creature that touches it.
Project your soul into an object, animating it.
Creates an explosion of conjured metal pellets.
Grant tactical knowledge to your allies, increasing their AC and Reflex saves.
Convince a target hat it contracted an affliction.
Creature re-lives an injury, taking 1d6 damage/level
Target acclimates to pressure changes more quickly
As protection from arrows, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Absorb 12 points/level of damage from one kind of energy.
Deal 1d6 points of damage per level to one haunt or spirit creature and stagger it.
Reduce the target's ability to tap into a specific energy type
Gives +2 to Str and Con, +1 on Will saves, -2 to AC.
Summon a swarm of poisonous frogs.
Target is compelled to stay near another.
Immediate burst of force provides +1 deflection bonus to AC per 2 caster levels
You gain DR 5/piercing and +4 to CMD against disarm attempts.
As resist energy, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Transfer some of your mythic essence to another creature.
As returning weapon, but you may divide the duration among weapons touched.
Follow a rumor to see where it spreads.
Treat your normal AC as your touch AC against the next touch attack that targets you.
As alarm, but only against selected creatures.
Enhance the sight of all creatures near you.
Force a target to see more darkness around them.
Imbue targets with a fraction of your mythic nature.
Perceive the world around your familiar.
Share your teamwork feats with allies
One subject/level takes only one action/round, -1 to AC, Reflex saves, and attack rolls.
Target takes 1d6 damage for each spell affecting it
As spider climb, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Give the target a -4 penalty on ability checks, skill checks, and any checks requiring concentration.
Magical field grants a +2 bonus to AC and on saves, and stuns multiple creatures attacking you.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
Summon a swarm of animated, flying teeth.
Creature moves at half speed, takes penalties, and has trouble casting spells.
As thought shield I, but +6 on Will saves.
As thought worm I, with a greater penalty to Will
When rolling a d20, roll 3d20 and choose the middle result
You can deliver an infusion, elixir, poison, or potion as a touch attack.
Grant allies a +4 bonus to resist enchantments/illusions.
Bestow your regeneration on your allies.
Target is compelled to avoid another creature.
Protective barrier of force knocks creatures and deals force damage
Touch deals 1d6 damage per two levels; caster gains damage as temporary hp.
Grant ability to speak, read, and write one or more languages for 8 hours.
Creatures that pass through the wall are nauseated and might fall prone.
Subject treads on water as if solid.
A cone of blood pushes creatures, sickens them, and makes the ground slick.
See through the target's eyes and ears.
As alter self, but you can change the shape as a swift action.
Pain encourages an outsider to obey you.
Target loses most of its memories
As animal aspect, but you gain two animal qualities.
Incorporeal creatures stay 10 ft. away from you.
Transport yourself and willing creatures to a random planar destination
Use a likeness to adopt a dead creature's form
Masks a creature's or an object's alignment, emotion, health, and magic auras.
Creatures in your aura become shaken.
Affected creatures don't count as allies for any purpose
Grants the target the benefits of an improved planar infusion
Gain a pool of luck that can be used to add a luck bonus to any d20 rolls, which can turn a failure into a success
Tentacles grapple all creatures within a 20-ft. spread.
Temporarily gain the effects of a corrupted creature's manifestations
Frees subjects from enchantments, transmutations, and curses.
Touch attack slows target, 1d4 Dex damage.
Does 2d8 damage +1/level (max +15) to creature and dispels an effect.
Makes monster believe it is your ally.
Create a phantasm with effects for all senses.
Creates a planar conjunction that slows movement, penalizes AC and Reflex saves, and imposes a miss chance on ranged attacks.
Transfer a scroll's power to the target; the scroll is then triggered as contingency.
Direct a summoned monster as if you had summoned it.
Create a nonmagical weapon, shield, or set of armor.
Subjects take -2 on attack rolls, damage rolls, saves, and checks.
Creature catches fire the next time it sleeps for an hour.
Set one of a list of contingencies for your demise.
Prevent death from hit point damage so long as this spell persists.
Inflicts an ill fate on a creature, halving its damage when it attacks or casts a spell
Make someone seem like an obvious liar.
Provides useful advice for specific proposed actions.
One animal obeys your silent mental commands and orders.
Surroundings and unfamiliar creatures seem like something out of a nightmare.
Create a phantasm that leeches onto the psyche of a nearby creature.
As ego whip I, but a -4 penalty and staggered for 1d4 rounds.
Trick opponents who try to cast enchantments on you.
See 60 ft. in darkness, including magical darkness.
Cause divinations of the future to reveal the result you choose.
You panic creatures caught in a 30ft cone of terror.
Targets gain a moral bonus to Strength, Constitution, and Will, as well as the rend ability with claws or unarmed strikes
Worms deal hp and Dex damage.
Hook of force drags you to the target.
Learn if an action you are about to take would be too difficult; choose an alternate path if it is.
As deep slumber, but only on one creature. This also causes them to lose some memories.
Subject moves normally despite impediments to restrict movement.
Commands subject of 7 HD or less.
Summon a wolf mount made of black smoke which emanates fear.
Makes one type of terrain appear like another (field as forest, or the like).
Sift through a creatures memories and make Knowledge checks with their modifier
Gain protection from fire, use absorbed energy to heal others.
Provide a heroism effect that you can reverse at any time
Give a creature a bite attack and a hunger for its own kind's flesh.
As hypnotism affecting more creatures and involving more requests
As id insinuation I, but affects three creatures and has a stronger confusion effect.
Make it seem like another is responsible for your attacks.
Wall, floor, or ceiling looks real, but anything can pass through.
Create illusory pillars that block movement
Creatures actions are seen as innocent
Create insects to scout an area for you.
Suppress emotion and fear effects in a 20-ft. radius as an immediate action.
As interrogation, except with more pain and more questions.
As invisibility, but subject can attack and stay invisible.
As plane shift, but only works on willing creatures and only transports to the Inner Planes
As magic aura, but also affects creatures and allows more options.
Target is compelled to plot against another.
As mental barrier I, but +8 to AC.
Learn answers from a subject's memories.
As mind thrust II, but a maximum of 15d8 points of damage and target is fatigued for 1 round.
Erase a portion of the target's mind and experiences, inflicting negative levels.
Creates one cloth or wood object.
As minor creation, except the object created is a semi-real illusion.
Mirror becomes a multiple-use dimension door.
Restrict target's access to its mythic power.
Imbues ammunition with accuracy against a specific creature type.
As nondetection, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
As oneiric horror, plus Str damage.
Cause creatures to forget about you once you have left their sight.
Grieving target can take no actions and is denied its Dex bonus.
As pain strike, but affects multiple creatures.
Gain fast healing 2, immunity to bleed, and faster recovery from diseases and poisons.
Trick a creature into thinking it can't breathe.
Fearsome illusion kills subject or deals 3d6 damage.
Resist harmful effects of other plane.
Exchange services with a 6 HD extraplanar creature.
As protection from energy, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Gain DR 5/- vs one type of natural attack
Weapons make no sound and quiet their victims.
As reduce person, but affects 1 humanoid creature/level.
Store hit point damage as magical energy.
Force globe protects but traps one subject.
Create an aura to exposes creature's emotional statebare.
As possession, but you observe instead of control the subject.
Spies on subject from a distance.
Weaken a creature to your divinations and enchantments
Teleport from one shadow to another.
Replace the target's body with mystic shadow material, causing them to take less damage from attacks.
Create a hidden room to conceal you on the edge of the Plane of Shadow.
Target gains a 50% chance to treat critical hits and sneak attacks as normal hits.
Deafens all within cone and deals 5d6 sonic damage.
Creates a double of a weak creature.
Causes creature to move while asleep.
Subject is immune to one spell per 4 levels.
Target loses a 3rd-level prepared spell or spell slot.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
Conjure a ship out of extradimensional materials
Prevent the target from communicating and cause it to act randomly.
Moves object, attacks creature, or hurls object or creature.
Launches an ally through the air.
Prevent all forms of telepathy in the area
Creature is compelled to harm itself.
Convince target that a nearby creature knows her greatest secret.
As thought shield I, but +8 on Will saves and stun creatures that read your thoughts for 1 round.
As thought worm II, with a partial penalty on a successful saving throw
As tongues, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Touch infests a target with green slime.
Determine where and when teleportation occurred, and glimpse the origin or destination.
As suggestion, but triggered only and target doesn't remember the suggestion.
Infuse mindless undead with power from the Shadow Plane, increasing their power.
Your glowing body dazzles or blinds others.
Plant a scrying sensor that you can use to spy on a creature, object, or location.
Cause a sleeping creature to retain some perception of its surroundings
Vomit an ooze copy of yourself that you can swap places with.
Translucent wall blinds or deafens creatures that pass through it.
Create a wall of bones that damages and grapples adjacent creatures
Outlines subject and produces light as a sunrod.
As water walk, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
You become immune to diseases and toxins, absorb one, and then spread it to others.
As animus mind, but stuns the offending creatures
Cause a creature to lose interest in its passions
As appearance of life, but deceiveing all of the senses
Targeted dispel transfers an effect to you.
As ally across time, but more cubes and more duplicates
Deal 1d8/level nonlethal damage to a daemon and make it confused.
Dispels touched illusion or a creature's change in form.
Curse a creature to weaken the DCs of its abilities and deal minimum damage with its attacks
Summon a caulborn to answer questions
When a target is harmed, so is the target's relative.
Emit a blast of force to damage and knock creatures prone
As charm person, but affects multiple creatures within 30 ft.
Create an area of semi-real gore
As command, but affects one subject/level.
People believe your ridiculous speech as long as you keep talking
Bestow a curse that is difficult to remove without fulfilling the condition.
Ask very powerful eldritch entities to find and converse with you, or they may reply telepathically.
Lets you ask question of extraplanar entity.
Cast a suggestion that gets passed on to secondary targets
Ward shadows so light cannot penetrate them.
As debilitating pain, with multiple targets
Protect your magic from attempts to dispel it
Forces a creature to return to native plane.
Sonic sense gives you blindsight 40 ft.
Draw forth a ghostly, animated ectoplasmic hand to do your bidding.
As ego whip I, but a -6 penalty and staggered for 1d6 rounds.
Trap an incorporeal creature or a haunt in a mirror.
Erase psychic impressions from an object.
Shroud your unconscious self in a cocoon on the Ethereal Plane.
Fill an area with invisible shards that slow movement and damage creatures.
Explode the head of a creature with 20 hp or fewer and deal damage in a 10-ft. radius around it.
Transforms raw materials into finished items.
Targets are panicked, and you gain temporary hit points.
Subject's Int and Cha drop to 1.
Charge, then teleport back to starting poisiton
Creature's armor and shield lose 1 AC and hardness/hour
As lesser guardian monument, except with DR 4/magic.
Transform a half-orc into a full-blooded orc.
As hold person, but any creature.
You create a dimensional link with a targeted creature, and switch spots with it.
As id insinuation I, but affects four creatures and you select the confusion effect.
Make it seem like another is responsible for your attacks while concealing your own actions.
As intellect fortress I, plus reduce the damage of mind-affecting effects.
Temporarily transfer one of your mythic path abilities to another creature.
Protects creatures from sustained environmental effects.
Prevents anyone from viewing or scrying an area for 24 hours.
As minor creation, plus stone and metal.
As major creation except the object created is a semi-real illusion.
As mental barrier III, plus 25% chance to prevent critical hits and sneak attacks.
Subjects in fog get -10 to Wis and Will checks.
Switch minds with another creature for 1 hour per level.
As mind thrust IV, but target is exhausted or fatigued for 1 round.
As minor reversion, but one creature per level
As nondetection, but any number of creatures or objects in the area
As lesser object possession, but with a larger object.
You fly at a speed of 40 ft. and can hustle over long distances.
Control the topic of conversation among a group of people.
Creates passage through wood or stone wall.
As peacebond, but on multiple weapons, even if they aren't sheathed.
As major image, but no concentration required.
Force a creature to see the negative side of things.
Traps extraplanar creature of 6 HD or less until it performs a task.
As many as 8 subjects travel to another plane.
Project your soul into a creature's body.
Perform a lengthy mental task in a private mindscape.
Sicken a target and cause it to start dying, or deal 3d6 + 1 points of damage per level on a save.
Heal a creature and remove its physical impairments
Stain the hand of a creature's killer red.
Gain psychic impressions from a distant location.
Telekinetic force rips your target limb from limb
Reconstruct past events from a set of tracks
Gain psychic impressions from past events in a location.
Create a wall that fascinates creatures that attempt to move through it
As complex hallucination, but without concentration.
Hides expensive chest on Ethereal Plane; you retrieve it at will.
Weak creatures are compelled to seek shelter
Changes appearance of one person per two levels.
Peaceful feelings harm those attempting violence.
Cause a creature to perform a suggested action while sleeping.
Target is distracted by its sense of self.
Forces targets to attack each other.
Sound moves targets away from you.
Protect your soul from harmful effects after death
As spell immunity, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Create a discordant blast of energy to disrupt a target's hold on magic and transfer it to you.
Sap mythic power from another creature.
As stoneskin, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
The target takes damage whenever its summoned creature does.
Temporarily teleport yourself and others to the surface
Deal 1d6 points of damage per level and stagger target for 1 minute.
As synaptic pulse, but for 1d4 rounds.
Communicate mentally with creatures within 100 ft.
Instantly transports you as far as 100 miles per level.
As thought shield III, but stun for 1d4 rounds and resist psychic crush spells.
As thought worm III, with greater penalties
As an immediate action, gives creatures in a 10-ft. radius spell resistance against psychic magic and mind-affecting effects.
Lets you see all things as they really are.
Communicate with any creature with a mind.
Treat penalties from emotion effects as bonuses instead
Target's attitude worsens by two categories.
Make an area seem worthless to others.
Wall of spirits blocks movement on Material Plane and Ethereal Plane and causes fear.
Sonic wall deflects and damages creatures.
Four mithral daggers speed around you, attacking nearby creatures and protecting your spellcasting from attacks of opportunity.
Attempt to weakne a corruption's effect at risk to yourself
You and an ally gain attack and AC bonuses.
Strike down creatures who thought you were their friend
Causes living creatures within 5 ft. to fall asleep.
Quckly search though a collection of texts to find the right information
Sets trigger condition for another spell.
As create mindscape, but affecting more creatures, having a longer duration, and allowing magic alteration.
Sense creatures suffering from fear, then teleport close to them.
Target is sickened while viewing trigger.
As bestow curse, but harder to remove.
Turn a critical hit into a decapitation.
Target can safely remove its head
